message:
feat(beads): add comprehensive Dashboard 360-View Cockpit bead structure

Create ~55 beads for dashboard enhancement epic:
- 1 main epic + 7 sub-epics (Layout, Data, Panels, Cards, Robot, Polish, Testing)
- 12 features covering all major components
- ~35 tasks with detailed descriptions and file references

Dependency structure:
- Layout + Data are foundation (parallel)
- Panels depends on Layout + Data
- Cards depends on Layout only
- Robot Mode depends on Data only
- Polish depends on Panels + Cards
- Testing depends on Panels + Robot

This enables 3 parallel workstreams for efficient implementation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
